terms.label: Solubility tag
terms.description: Coding sequence fused to a protein product to improve soluble expression or folding.

routine_hints.rationale: Project vocabulary term component_kind:solubility_tag marks a frame-sensitive coding fusion and should favor scar-aware overlap assembly.

terms.label: Periplasmic export
terms.description: Helper construct includes a secretion or sorting signal intended to direct an expressed product to the bacterial periplasm.
